query:
SELECT s1.externalId AS sasboss_id, s1.customerExternalId,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sx.externalId) FROM services sx WHERE sx.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId AND sx.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND sx.serviceType = 'Internet') AS real_count
FROM services s1
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId)
LIMIT 10;

SELECT s1.externalId AS sasboss_id, s1.customerExternalId,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sx.externalId) FROM services sx WHERE sx.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId AND sx.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND sx.serviceType = 'Internet') AS real_count
FROM services s1
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId)
LIMIT 10;
